description: Organize the emergency preparedness supplies inventory by tracking expiration dates, calculating days until expiration, and categorizing urgency with formulas. Apply conditional formatting for visual priority assessment and save the updated spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/emergency_supplies.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have a spreadsheet of emergency supplies with some missing expiration dates. Fill in the missing dates based on purchase date and standard shelf life. Create formulas to calculate days until expiration and categorize urgency status (EXPIRED/IMMEDIATE/SOON/OK). Apply conditional formatting to highlight urgent items. Sort by priority.
